results.title: When More is Less: Understanding CoT Length in LLMs
results.snippet: Inverted U-shaped curve of accuracy vs CoT length; optimal length increases with task difficulty; theoretical model with scaling laws for optimal length.

results.title: How Well do LLMs Compress Their Own CoT? A Token Complexity Approach
results.snippet: Universal trade-off curve between response length and accuracy across prompting strategies; each task has intrinsic token complexity.

results.title: Reasoning Efficiently Through Adaptive CoT Compression
Is CoT Reasoning of LLMs a Mirage
Demystifying Long Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in LLMs
results.snippet: Long CoT SFT allows higher performance; RL improvements easier.

results.title: Survey of Long CoT for Reasoning LLMs
